title: anthistiria mutica
intro: Anthistiria mutica, also known as the desert broom grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions. Anthistiria mutica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for its herbal uses, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
